hallucinations.description: Reported metrics (e.g., Spearman 0.884/0.838/0.828, CDCS 0.825, Top-K gaps) do not match actual experiment outputs from provided code and ablation summaries, which show different values and heavy reliance on synthetic data.
hallucinations.evidence: Paper claims specific results on WikiText-2/AG News/CodeSearchNet; code shows mismatched numbers, synthetic KV focus, and varying CDCS ~0.80-0.83 across seeds.

overall_assessment: Hallucinations found: broken math equation and fabricated/mismatched experimental metrics. Severity moderate; core idea plausible but results unreliable.
